subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-08-19 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: God willing, this shall come to pass, for naught is difficult for God. He Who bestowed this gift upon Mirza Abu'l-Fadl shall likewise bestow it upon these souls. Though Mirza Abu'l-Fadl knew not foreign tongues, these do possess such knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله می شوند، لیس علی الله بعزیز. آنکه به میرزا ابوالفضل داد، [به] اینها هم می دهد.  میرزا ابوالفضل لسان اجنبی نمی دانست، اینها می دانند
subcodes.subjects: @effort; striving, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @praise and encouragement
